heading: Thursday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Rain likely early, then changing to snow showers late, while diminishing. Lows from the upper teens to mid 20s north, and upper 20s to mid 30s in the south. Southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, becoming northwest and gusting to 25 mph late.

heading: Friday
text: Chance of a mountains snow shower early, then clouds decreasing in the valleys, and doing so more gradually over high terrain. Blustery and much colder, with valley highs from the mid 30s to around 40 south, and upper 20s to mid 30s north. Northwest winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Friday Night
text: Mainly clear and cold. Lows 5 to 15 north, around zero in the cold spots, and in the teens to around 20 south. North winds 5 to 10 mph, diminishing after midnight.
